questionText: How can we all be healthy
design: 3 topics × 4 synths × 5 paraphrases = 60 (archetype A: clean recovery)

synths.name: daily-cardio
paraphrases: Do aerobic exercise like running or cycling on a daily basis.
Get your heart pumping every day with cardio such as jogging or swimming.
Build a habit of regular cardiovascular workouts to stay fit.
Raise your pulse routinely through activities like brisk biking and runs.
Keep your heart strong by doing daily endurance training.

synths.name: strength-training
paraphrases: Lift weights several times a week to build muscle.
Incorporate resistance workouts to strengthen your body.
Do strength exercises like squats and push-ups regularly.
Train with dumbbells and resistance bands to grow stronger.
Build muscular power through consistent weightlifting sessions.

synths.name: flexibility-stretching
paraphrases: Stretch your muscles daily to stay limber and mobile.
Practice yoga or stretching routines to improve flexibility.
Loosen up your joints with regular mobility exercises.
Keep your body supple by stretching before and after activity.
Improve your range of motion through gentle daily flexibility work.

synths.name: active-commuting
paraphrases: Walk or bike to work instead of driving whenever you can.
Choose to commute on foot or by bicycle to add movement to your day.
Skip the car and travel actively by walking or cycling.
Turn your daily commute into exercise by biking or walking there.
Get around using your own two feet or a bike rather than a vehicle.

synths.name: eat-vegetables
paraphrases: Fill your plate with plenty of fresh vegetables and fruit.
Eat more greens and produce at every meal.
Make vegetables and fruits the centerpiece of your diet.
Load up on colorful plant foods throughout the day.
Increase how many veggies and fruits you consume daily.

synths.name: limit-sugar
paraphrases: Cut back on sugary snacks and sweetened drinks.
Reduce the amount of added sugar in your diet.
Avoid candy, soda, and desserts to lower your sugar intake.
Steer clear of processed foods loaded with sugar.
Minimize how much sweet stuff you eat each day.

synths.name: stay-hydrated
paraphrases: Drink plenty of water throughout the day.
Keep yourself well hydrated by sipping water regularly.
Make sure you take in enough fluids daily.
Carry a water bottle and refill it often to stay hydrated.
Replenish your body's fluids by drinking water all day long.

synths.name: portion-control
paraphrases: Watch your serving sizes to avoid overeating.
Keep meal portions moderate and balanced.
Eat smaller amounts to manage how much you consume.
Be mindful of how much food you put on your plate.
Control calorie intake by limiting portion sizes.

synths.name: annual-physical
paraphrases: Visit your doctor every year for a complete checkup.
Schedule a yearly physical exam with your physician.
Get an annual health review from your general practitioner.
Book a routine medical examination once a year.
See your GP annually to assess your overall health.

synths.name: vaccinations
paraphrases: Stay up to date on your immunizations and shots.
Get vaccinated against preventable diseases.
Keep your vaccines current to protect against illness.
Receive recommended immunizations on schedule.
Protect yourself by getting the appropriate vaccines.

synths.name: dental-checkups
paraphrases: Visit the dentist regularly for cleanings and exams.
See your dentist twice a year to care for your teeth.
Keep up routine dental appointments to maintain oral health.
Get your teeth checked and cleaned by a dental professional.
Schedule regular dental visits to prevent cavities and gum disease.

synths.name: self-monitoring
paraphrases: Track your blood pressure and weight at home regularly.
Keep an eye on vital signs like blood pressure yourself.
Monitor your own health metrics between doctor visits.
Check measurements such as weight and pulse at home.
Watch your personal health numbers using home devices.
